evolution.summary: （AI 摘要生成失败）Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities a
Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 对教皇 Leo XIV 通谕《Magnifica humanitas》发表回应，内容为 AI 伦理与社会层面评论。
